title: Karnataka court grants bail to BJP MLA Byrathi Basavaraj in murder case
description: A trial court in Bengaluru on Thursday granted bail to BJP Member of Karnataka Legislative Assembly (MLA) Byrathi Basavaraj in the Biklu Shiva murder case [BA Basavaraja v State by Bharathinagar Police].Special judge Santhosh Gajanan Bhat granted bail, subject to Basavaraj furnishing a personal bond of ₹ 2 lakhs.Among other bail conditions, the MLA has also been warned not to intimidate or attempt to influence witnesses, and not to leave the country jurisdiction without permission.
